Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Answer Of Defendants Ashok Gujral, Sf Realty Partners Llc, Gep Spv 1 Llc, And Growth Equity Partners Llc
Off Calendar Dec-05-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jennifer E. Choi, 415.554.3887 for Plaintiff/Moving party City and County of San Franisco
Sean O'Neal 415.421.3400 for Defendants/Opposing parties Ashok Gujral et al.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Motion To Strike Answer Of Defendants Ashok Gujral, Sf Realty Partners Llc, Gep Spv 1 Llc, And Growth Equity Partners LLLC is GRANTED with leave to amend for Defendants to file answers in conformity with CCP 431.30(d). CCP 446(a) issue re: verification is not properly before the Court at this time. Defendants fail to cite any authority for the proposition that they are excused from compliance with CCP 431.30(d) due to potential CCP 446(a) or 5th Amendment applicability. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
